MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-16-2006 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-16-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: HARRISON NAM FOR PLAINTIFF GREGORY MCDOWELL
LIMITED SCOPE REPRESENTATION BY RICHARD BACKER FOR DEFENDANT DIANA GREER

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. CASE SETTLED. TRIAL DATE OFF CALENDAR. TERMS OF SETTLEMENT PLACED ON RECORD AS FOLLOWS:DEFENDANT TO VACATE PREMISES AT 1296 TREAT AVE BY END OF DAY 5/31/06.IF DEFENDANT VACATES TIMELY, PLAINTIFF TO WAIVE RENT OF $8976 (RENT FROM AUG 1,2005 - 2/28/06) AND ALSO WAIVE RENT IN THE SUM OF $2838 (RENT FROM 3/1/06 THROUGH 5/31/06). PLAINITIFF WILL ALSO RETURN $850 IN ONE WEEK. A SECURITY DEPOSIT WAS NEVER RECEIVED BY PLAINTIFF. MUTUAL RELEASE PER 1542CC. NEUTRAL REFERENCE TO BE PROVIDED BY PLAINTIFF. IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO VACATE BY 5/31/06, WITH 24 HOUR NOTICE, PLAINTIFF TO FILE EXPARTE APPLICATION FOR JUDGMENT FOR POSSESSION, AND MONEY DAMAGES IN THE SUM OF $4000. ALL PARTIES UNDERSTAND THAT THIS IS AN ENFORCEABLE AGREEMENT.

JUDGE PRO TEM:NILS ROSENQUEST/ROBERT RYAN; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS; REPORTER: CANDACE YOUNT (218)
